bullets: Pray for traumatized believers in Indonesia who were forcibly driven from worship, asking God to protect their legal right to gather and bring lasting peace.
Lift up the three detained believers in China, reported by ChinaAid, that authorities would release them and that their vulnerable congregation of around 30 members would find strength and courage.
Ask God to bring the 20 Christians still held hostage in India to safety, and to comfort the families of the three pastors killed returning from a peace conference.
Pray for the more than 180 Adivasi Christian families in India denied access to water, livelihoods, and forest resources, that their basic needs would be met and their faith protected from coercion.
Pray for the more than two million civilians in Gaza, including children and displaced families, who face ongoing airstrikes, expanding military occupation, and worsening humanitarian conditions.

Lift up the people of Lebanon, where over three thousand have been killed, more than one million remain displaced, and families are spending the Eid holiday grieving loved ones and sheltering in ruins.
Ask God for wisdom for negotiators from the United States and Iran as they work toward a ceasefire extension that protects civilians and prevents further military escalation.
Pray for civilians in Ukraine as the United Nations warns the war risks spiraling out of control following a wave of large-scale strikes across the country.
Lift up the people of Sudan, especially unarmed villagers in North Kordofan attacked during the Eid holiday, killing at least twenty-seven civilians including elderly residents.
Pray for the families of sixteen girls killed and seventy-nine injured in a dormitory fire at a boarding school in Kenya, and for those still recovering from serious burns.
Ask God to protect civilians and health workers in eastern Congo, where armed conflict and a renewed Ebola outbreak are combining to create a devastating humanitarian emergency.
Lift up the people of Burkina Faso as the military government tightens restrictions on civil society, suppressing student voices and limiting organized opposition outside government control.
Pray for foreign workers in South Africa facing threats, violence, and forced displacement as anti-immigrant groups intensify pressure ahead of a self-imposed deadline.
Ask God to bring justice and healing to the Philippines as an international tribunal prepares to try a former leader for crimes against humanity tied to thousands of extrajudicial killings.
Lift up people held in immigration detention facilities in the United States who report inhumane conditions, and ask God for dignity and fair treatment for all detainees.
Pray for peace in Guatemala as its government and foreign powers navigate tensions over drug trafficking and the boundaries of national sovereignty.
Pray for sick and malnourished civilians in Palestine who are cut off from medicines, that aid workers gain access and that disease and suffering are halted.
Pray for communities in Congo facing both Ebola and armed conflict, that health workers can reach the sick and that the outbreak is contained before more lives are lost.
Lift up vulnerable people across Portugal, Italy, France, and western Europe enduring record-breaking heat, especially children and those without access to cool shelter.
Ask God for safety and calm for communities in Indonesia who felt shallow earthquake tremors, that no injuries or aftershocks cause further harm.
Pray for residents across Guam and surrounding Pacific islands, that they remain safe following recent seismic activity along the Pacific Ring of Fire.
